_title: LINR — For the thoughts in between
hero.label: Your personal journal
hero.title: For the thoughts in between.
hero.description: LINR is your private space for reflection — completely offline, with AI on your device. No cloud, no accounts, no compromises.
voice.label: Voice input
voice.title: Just start talking.
voice.description: Don't feel like typing? LINR converts your voice to text — and the on-device AI summarizes it on request. Up to 1,500 characters, processed directly on your device.
voice.check2: Completely on-device — nothing leaves your phone
analysis.label: Analysis
analysis.title: Understand yourself better.
analysis.mood_desc: Spot patterns in your emotional life. The mood slider (0–100%) tracks your mood over weeks and months — with calendar view and colorful mood dots.
analysis.mirror_desc: Daily AI reflection on your entry. Your personal mirror that helps you look deeper.
analysis.summaries_desc: AI-generated weekly, monthly, and yearly overviews. 48 different writing styles — from neutral to brutally honest.
analysis.stats_desc: Weekday profiles, tag analysis, writing stats — plus Premium: people ranking, topic of the month, and hidden connections.
free.title: Everything you need. For free.
free.subtitle: LINR gives you all the tools for your daily journaling — no hidden costs.
free.diary_desc: Text, mood, emotions, tags, and photos — all in one place.
free.calendar_desc: Your month at a glance — with colorful mood dots for every day.
free.flashbacks_desc: "Remember this?" — Cards with old entries that surprise you.
free.badges_desc: Gamification with ranks — stay motivated and build streaks.
free.reminders_desc: Local notifications so you never forget to write.
free.export_desc: JSON export/import — your data belongs to you, always.
privacy.title: Your thoughts. Your device. Period.
privacy.description: LINR has no backend, no cloud sync, no tracking. All data stays locally on your device. The AI runs on-device with Apple Intelligence and Gemini Nano — nothing is ever uploaded.
privacy.offline_desc: No server, no account, no cloud. Everything stays on your device.
privacy.ai_desc: Apple Foundation Models & Gemini Nano — the AI never leaves your phone.
privacy.faceid_desc: Biometric lock — only you can access your journal.
cta.title: Ready for your journal?
cta.description: Download LINR for free and start writing. No sign-up, no setup — just get started.
